mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (target_user_id, sender_id, title, content) VALUES (#{targetUserId}, #{senderId}, #{title}, #{content})

INSERT INTO notification (target_user_id, sender_id, title, content) VALUES
(#{item.targetUserId}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE pk_notification = #{pkNotification}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND is_read = 0
